taxonomy: Juncoides caespitosa belongs to the family Juncaceae, commonly known as the rush family. This family is part of the order Poales, a group of flowering plants that also includes grasses and sedges. The family Juncaceae is further divided into several genera, with Juncoides being one of them. As a member of the Juncaceae family, Juncoides caespitosa is closely related to other plants such as Juncus and Luzula.
